summary: Archon Disc M+ B->A +4 surv shifts, 680 enc cells; other tiers 0. SimC/Mythicstats moved, Murlok/BM 0. WCL rdps-broken:5 unreach,3 raw. No new build; 6 takes+6 metaNotes, queue->0.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl; parsed table.tier-list rows (tier <td> + tier-list-entry img alt). Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7 / Devourer. 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs stored. Page snapshots 07-18 to 07-19.

Both pages fetched live; parsed tier__tier s/a/b/c blocks via img alt. Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream - absence, not error), M+ 40 = 79 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored. Snapshots 07-18 to 07-19.

All 6 pages fetched via r.jina.ai (x-no-cache). Numbered rankings parsed leniently (both '(A Tier)' and '(S-Tier)'/no-space idioms). Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7. 80 rows (40+40), 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored. Snapshots 07-18 to 07-19.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection; 80 rows, 0 unmatched, upstream lastUpdated 2026-07-18T12Z (daily noon refresh, today's not yet posted). 1 M+ tier move: Discipline Priest B->A (1-band, reverting yesterday's A->B churn). Snapshots 07-18 to 07-19.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched, 36 changed vs stored across 13 encounters (normal daily churn). encounter-tiers.json asOf 07-18 to 07-19.

Survivability tierList parsed from the 3 raid pages - full 40/40 specs, merged via apply-metrics survivability key. 4 real 1-band shifts (all healers softening: RestoSham A->B; RestoDruid/Preservation/Discipline B->C). asOf 07-18 to 07-19.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) fetched via r.jina.ai x-no-cache; numbered Tier table parsed by 'Meta Build' title, 40 specs matched, 0 unmatched. Era-verified MN 12.0.7 Season 1. 0 moves vs stored. Raid pages still '0 records' upstream - left unranked (snapshot null). Snapshots 07-18 to 07-19.

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-19T11:39Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 - the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline (coverage 07-09, 40 rows).
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:172 3T:115 5T:1642). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-19.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar and Ula'tek 0 = untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-19.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 764-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-19.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET; parsed the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling by spec-name h3 (handles reversed href/class attribute order), range 3738-4288. Era-verified Midnight Season 1. 0 value changes vs stored (Murlok refreshes ~8h). asOf 07-18 to 07-19.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 + ptr(string '0')=live confirmed on every chart; best-build DPS at counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design. 0 target changes vs stored. asOf 07-18 to 07-19.

Nightly MID1_Raid report (.html, 37MB) re-fetched: WoW 12.0.7.68453 Live hotfix 2026-07-18, SimC 1205-01 (the visible 12.3.0 is the Highcharts JS lib, not WoW) - era-verified, no season flip. 26/26 DPS parsed as best variant per spec from player-section headers; all 26 shifted (nightly sim variance). Augmentation excluded by design. asOf 07-18 to 07-19.

Period 1072 (ongoing reset) re-fetched live via r.jina.ai /period/latest; era-verified, no season flip. Representation section = 39 specs (Resto Druid absent = negligible top-2000 presence, kept at stored 0.1), 38/39 values moved vs stored (an ongoing period's top-2000 distribution evolves daily). 40 rows total. asOf 07-18 to 07-19.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Linxy Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14 22:46Z) under already-logged build #14 - NO new forum development-notes build. All 25 unique creator RSS feeds polled live (25/25 OK).
